generic_title_collision.impact: Causes Tier A auto-acceptance on common terms across unrelated games.
generic_title_collision.mitigation: Implemented Blacklist and demoted to Tier B (Review Required).

curated_subset_overreach.impact: Weak identity confirmation for partial folders.
curated_subset_overreach.mitigation: Increased Tier A overlap threshold to 80%.

folder_name_false_authority.impact: Folder names that are numbered but lack the release name.
folder_name_false_authority.mitigation: Explicitly flagged as Review Only category.

contradiction_gate_failure.mitigation: Hard-block in Tiering logic (Always Tier D).
